name: Brotherton Land Surveying
description: Locally owned surveying business providing residential surveys to Middle Tennessee.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: Brotherton Land Surveying is the epitome of professionalism, meeting government requirements while satisfying his client.
Keith Brotherton was genuinely wonderful to work with. I found him to be honest, trustworthy, precise, and a man of his word.
Anyone would be hard pressed to find a better survey (anywhere) in USA
they call you back; you actually get to speak with a real person who is genuinely interested in helping you!

sentiment.summary: Brotherton Land Surveying has an exceptional reputation built on professionalism, reliability, responsiveness, and honest communication, with consistently positive feedback across all reviews.

name: Clint Elliott Survey
description: Nashville-based land surveying firm offering commercial, residential, construction layout, and oil & gas pipeline surveys. Operates Monday-Friday 8am-4pm CST.

name: Collier Engineering Co., Inc.
description: Provides land surveying services including ALTA surveys and topographic surveys for projects in Nashville and surrounding areas like Williamson County.
